dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry condition 1: Price crosses above 200-day MA (initial penetration). Entry condition 2: Price remains above 200-day MA (confirmation for at least 2 consecutive closes achieved through persistent > comparison). Entry condition 3: Volume above 20-day average (vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 implied by '>' operator). Exit at trend break (price crosses below 200-day MA) OR at 120-day hold period maximum. Direction is LONG as signal specifies long positions only.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry condition 1: Price crosses above 200-day MA (initial penetration). Entry condition 2: Price remains above 200-day MA (confirmation for at least 2 consecutive closes achieved through persistent > comparison). Entry condition 3: Volume above 20-day average (vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 implied by '>' operator). Exit at trend break (price crosses below 200-day MA) OR at 120-day hold period maximum. Direction is LONG as signal specifies long positions only.

source_rule_text: A trader should initiate long positions when price penetrates above the 200-day moving average, as this condition generally leads to sustained appreciation over a multi-month holding period.
